entry.title: RAGLAN CROPPED TEE - ROYAL BLUE
entry.summary:
Vendor: DRIP STUDIOS
Type: Product
Price: 1399.00

MODEL HEIGHT 5'9" WEARING M SIZE

240 GSM. Premium French Terry Cotton. Cropped Silhouette with Raglan Full Sleeves. Minimal Design. Gender-Neutral. Combed & Bio-washed.

This cropped 240 GSM full-sleeve T-shirt from Drip Studios is crafted for a clean, super-decent everyday look. Designed with raglan sleeves, it offers a relaxed shoulder fit and effortless movement, while the cropped length adds a modern, balanced silhouette. Made from premium French terry cotton, this tee delivers softness, breathability, and lasting comfort. With its basic, minimal aesthetic and refined finish, it’s a versatile essential that pairs easily with any wardrobe for understated style.

Care Guide

Machine wash the T-shirt inside out with similar colors. Use cold water to preserve fabric quality. Tumble dry on low heat or air dry to prevent shrinkage. Store in a cool, dry place to maintain the fabric’s integrity.

Core Features

240 GSM French terry fabric for a lightweight yet premium feel. Cropped length with full raglan sleeves for a relaxed, modern fit. Gender-neutral design suitable for diverse body types. Soft, breathable combed cotton for all-day comfort. Bio-washed finish ensures durability and a smooth hand feel.

entry.title: REGULAR RINGER CROPPED TEE II
entry.summary:
Vendor: DRIPDRIP
Type: T-Shirt
Price: 1399.00

240 GSM. Premium Fabric. Minimal Design. 100% Combed Cotton. Ringer Style Neck & Sleeves. Gender-Neutral. Regular-Fit Cropped Silhouette. Combed & Bio-washed.

This premium 240 GSM ringer cropped T-shirt from Drip Studios blends classic aesthetics with a modern cropped silhouette. Designed with contrasting ringer detailing on the neckline and sleeve hems, it delivers a subtle vintage-inspired edge while maintaining a clean, minimal look. The regular cropped fit offers balanced structure with everyday comfort, making it easy to style across casual and streetwear outfits. Crafted from 100% combed cotton and finished with a bio-wash, the fabric feels soft, breathable, and durable for long-lasting wear. With no prints or graphics, this tee remains a versatile wardrobe essential built for effortless styling.

Care Guide

Machine wash the T-shirt inside out with similar colors using cold water. Avoid bleach. Tumble dry on low heat or air dry to maintain fabric quality and structure. Store in a cool, dry place to preserve the finish.

Core Features

240 GSM premium cotton fabric for a balanced, structured feel. Regular-fit cropped silhouette designed for modern everyday wear. Classic ringer neckline and sleeve contrast detailing. Minimal blank design for versatile styling. Gender-neutral construction suitable for multiple body types. Combed and bio-washed cotton for enhanced softness, breathability, and durability.

entry.title: NAVY POLO
entry.summary:
Vendor: DRIPDRIP
Type: T-Shirt
Price: 1499.00

220 GSM. Super Premium Matte Lycra Fabric. Refined Polo Construction. Combed & Bio-washed. Gender-Neutral. Tailored Regular Fit.

This super-premium 220 GSM polo T-shirt from Drip Studios is designed for those who appreciate quiet luxury in everyday essentials. Crafted from a refined matte lycra blend, the fabric offers a smooth, elevated finish with natural stretch for comfort and structure. The tailored regular fit delivers a sharp, composed silhouette, while the classic polo collar adds a touch of timeless sophistication.

Combed and bio-washed for exceptional softness and durability, this polo balances breathability, polish, and long-lasting performance. Built to transition seamlessly from relaxed settings to elevated occasions, it stands as a modern wardrobe staple defined by restraint, precision, and premium craftsmanship.

Care Guide

Wash inside out with similar colors using cold water to preserve the fabric’s finish and depth. Avoid harsh detergents. Tumble dry on low heat or air dry to maintain shape and elasticity. Store folded in a cool, dry space to retain its premium quality.

Core Features

220 GSM super-premium matte lycra fabric for a smooth, luxurious finish. Refined polo collar for timeless versatility. Tailored regular fit for a composed, elevated silhouette. Combed cotton blend ensures breathability and all-day comfort. Bio-washed treatment enhances softness, durability, and fabric longevity.

entry.title: HENLEY - BLACK
entry.summary:
Vendor: DRIPDRIP
Type: T-Shirt
Price: 1499.00

MODEL HEIGHT 5'9" WEARING M SIZE

220 GSM. Hefty Cotton Fabric. Slim Fit Body-Hugging Silhouette. 96% Cotton & 4% Spandex. Gender-Neutral. Made in India.

This premium 220 GSM slim-fit T-shirt is designed to elevate everyday essentials with a refined, body-hugging silhouette. Crafted from a luxurious blend of 96% cotton and 4% spandex, it offers the perfect balance of softness, stretch, and structure for all-day comfort. The hefty cotton fabric delivers a smooth, premium hand feel while maintaining breathability and shape retention. Thoughtfully made in India, this tee is built to move with you—enhancing your style with clean lines, superior fit, and lasting quality.

Care Guide

Machine wash inside out with similar colors using cold water. Do not bleach. Tumble dry on low heat or air dry to preserve fabric stretch and shape. Iron on low heat if required. Store in a cool, dry place.

Core Features

220 GSM hefty cotton fabric for a premium, structured feel. Slim-fit, body-hugging design that enhances natural shape. 96% cotton and 4% spandex blend for softness, flexibility, and comfort. Breathable construction suitable for everyday wear. Excellent stretch and recovery for long-term shape retention. Made in India with a focus on quality craftsmanship.

Price: 1499.00

MODEL HEIGHT 5'9" WEARING M SIZE

220 GSM. Hefty Cotton Fabric. Slim Fit Body-Hugging Silhouette. 96% Cotton & 4% Spandex. Gender-Neutral. Made in India.

This premium 220 GSM slim-fit T-shirt is designed to elevate everyday essentials with a refined, body-hugging silhouette. Crafted from a luxurious blend of 96% cotton and 4% spandex, it offers the perfect balance of softness, stretch, and structure for all-day comfort. The hefty cotton fabric delivers a smooth, premium hand feel while maintaining breathability and shape retention. Thoughtfully made in India, this tee is built to move with you—enhancing your style with clean lines, superior fit, and lasting quality.

Products in lighter shades (such as white or off-white) are not eligible for return or exchange due to the high risk of stains, discoloration, or signs of use during handling or trial. Customers are advised to review product details carefully before placing an order for these colors.

Care Guide

Machine wash inside out with similar colors using cold water. Do not bleach. Tumble dry on low heat or air dry to preserve fabric stretch and shape. Iron on low heat if required. Store in a cool, dry place.

Core Features

220 GSM hefty cotton fabric for a premium, structured feel. Slim-fit, body-hugging design that enhances natural shape. 96% cotton and 4% spandex blend for softness, flexibility, and comfort. Breathable construction suitable for everyday wear. Excellent stretch and recovery for long-term shape retention. Made in India with a focus on quality craftsmanship.

entry.title: GREY BASIC BOTTOMS
entry.summary:
Vendor: DRIP STUDIOS
Type: bottoms
Price: 1899.00

MODEL HEIGHT 5'10 AND WAIST SIZE 32 WEARING M BOTTOMS.

420 GSM TAPED COTTON FLEECE
COMBED & BIO-WASHED FINISH
STRAIGHT BAGGY FIT
MELANGE GREY MINIMAL DESIGN
UNISEX ARTICLE [REFER TO SIZE CHART FOR ACCURATE MEASUREMENTS].

  • Crafted from 420 GSM premium taped cotton fleece for a structured yet soft feel with long-lasting durability.
  • Straight baggy silhouette offers relaxed comfort and effortless everyday styling.
  • Clean, blank design allows versatile pairing with any outfit, from elevated basics to statement layers.
  • Melange grey tone adds depth and refinement while remaining easy to style year-round.
  • Taped fleece construction enhances structure while maintaining flexibility and comfort.
  • Perfect for all seasons, balancing warmth, breathability, and premium weight.

Care Guide

  • Machine wash the bottoms inside out with similar colors.
  • Use cold water to maintain fabric quality and color texture.
  • Tumble dry on low heat or air dry to preserve structure.
  • Store folded in a cool, dry place to retain shape and finish.

Core Features

  • 420 GSM taped fleece construction for a substantial premium feel.
  • Straight baggy fit designed for comfort and versatile styling.
  • Unisex silhouette suited for multiple body types.
  • Blank minimal design for effortless outfit pairing.
  • Elasticated waist for adjustable comfort and everyday wear.
  • Balanced fabric weight ideal for all-season use.

  • Use cold water to maintain fabric texture and color richness.

Core Features

  • Elasticated waist for adjustable everyday comfort.

entry.title: DRIP BASICS SWEATPANTS – F
entry.summary:
Vendor: DRIP STUDIOS
Type: bottoms
Price: 1799.00

420 GSM.

  • Cotton fleece fabric.
  • Straight baggy fit.
  • Combed & bio washed.
  • Only for female.
  • Designed for ultimate comfort and effortless style.
  • Straight-fit joggers made from luxurious 350 GSM fabric.
  • Offers a soft feel and superior durability.
  • Features a convenient back pocket for added utility.
  • Blends practicality with everyday streetwear style.
  • Suitable for casual days or elevated street looks.
Care Guide
  • Machine wash the jogger inside out with like colors.
  • Use cold water to preserve the fabric’s quality.
  • Tumble dry on low heat or air dry to prevent shrinkage.
  • Store the jogger in a cool, dry place to prevent moisture or mold buildup.
Core Features
  • Joggers with 420 GSM (Grams per Square Meter) for a durable and substantial feel.
  • Straight baggy fit for comfortable and versatile wear.
  • Unisex article suitable for a wide range of body types and style preferences.
  • Back pocket for convenient storage.
  • Elasticated waist to adjust for a custom fit and added style.
  • Soft, breathable jersey fabric ensures comfort and airflow.
